title: Friends, Not Food [Exemplar Activism] - Vegan / Anti-Speciesism T-Shirt
description:
I strongly believe in **'Exemplar Activism'**. That is, if you are good at what you do (maybe you are an Academician, or a Performing Artist, or just a casual person who bench presses 85 Kgs), and you stand for a cause (in this case, Veganism / Anti-Speciesism), then you automatically spread the cause by being an example. 
 
 Hence I have put together these two images that can be printed on T-Shirts. If you believe you can be an Exemplar Activist, you can download these images and print a shirt with a vendor of your choice!
